recent_excerpts: Resilience analysis links security gaps to financial losses, giving CISOs hard data to convince boards to fund defenses. Report ties specific controls to premium reductions.
ESET argues cybersecurity is an unmeasured competitive advantage enabling safe operations in hostile environments, not just a cost center. Brief analysis.
